content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be reengineered to weight episodic memory retention by the intrinsic curiosity signal generated by ICM/RND curiosity-driven reinforcement learning methods. This creates a self-organizing memory buffer that automatically prioritizes storing uncertain, high-learning-potential experiences instead of retaining redundant or low-value observations.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
